names.ar: Game box, hounds and jackals, Reniseneb (Game of Hounds and Jackals)

category: Game box, hounds and jackals, Reniseneb

dimensions.text:
Board: H. 6.8 cm (2 11/16 in.); W. 10.1 cm (4 in.); D. 15.6 cm (6 1/8 in.); Average height with pins: 14 cm (5 1/2 in.); Jackal pins: H. 7 cm (2 3/4 in.) to 8.5 cm (3 3/8 in.) Bottom (2012.508): L. 12.9 cm (5 1/16 in); W. 7.4 cm (2 15/16 in); Th. 0.3 cm (1/8 in)
Hound pins: H. 6 cm (2 3/8 in.) to 6.8 cm (2 11/16 in.)

description.ar: Game box, hounds and jackals, Reniseneb مصرية قديمة، معروفة بـ«Game of Hounds and Jackals»، تعود إلى الدولة الوسطى، (الأسرة الثانية عشرة)، مصنوعة من خشب الأبنوس وivory، محفوظة حاليًا في متحف المتروبوليتان للفنون، نيويورك.
description.en:
Game of Hounds and Jackals — Game box, hounds and jackals, Reniseneb. Period: Middle Kingdom, Dynasty 12, dated to ca. 1814–1805 B.C.. Medium: Ebony, ivory. Dimensions: Board: H. 6.8 cm (2 11/16 in.); W. 10.1 cm (4 in.); D. 15.6 cm (6 1/8 in.); Average height with pins: 14 cm (5 1/2 in.); Jackal pins: H. 7 cm (2 3/4 in.) to 8.5 cm (3 3/8 in.) Bottom (2012.508): L. 12.9 cm (5 1/16 in); W. 7.4 cm (2 15/16 in); Th. 0.3 cm (1/8 in)
Hound pins: H. 6 cm (2 3/8 in.) to 6.8 cm (2 11/16 in.). Excavation: Carnarvon/Carter excavations, 1910. Country of origin: Egypt. Credit: Purchase, Edward S. Harkness Gift, 1926 (26.7.1287a-k); Gift of Lord Carnarvon, 2012 (2012.508).
